meta.scenario: tech house +1 move, late groove exit (bar 80), BPM cool-down 136→129

transition_arc: T1 is a dense tech house track. Exit at bar 80 (late groove exit) means DJ played most of the track. T2 from_bar=8 skips its 8-bar intro percussion and enters at first real groove hit. The 6.8 BPM downshift (136→129 BPM) reduces intensity slightly — intentional cool-down move.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 0: immediate kick+bass groove, high energy from bar 0, RMS 0.60
annotated_actions.why: Tech house with no intro — enters directly at full groove.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 80: drums=0.65, harmonic=0.3, rms=0.55 — full groove, past peak, late in track
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: percussion only (hi-hats, no kick yet), bass=0.0, rms=0.20
annotated_actions.why: T1 bar 80 is past structural peak but still energetic. DJ exits late to maximize T1 groove. T2 sparse entry at bar 8 creates a brief perceived energy breath — intentional.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 8: hi-hats + snare, no kick yet, bass=0.0
annotated_actions.why: T2 from_bar=8: first rhythmic content. drums:0.8 adds hi-hat layer over T1's fading groove. bass:0.0 keeps low end clean while T1's bass fades.

annotated_actions.t1_state: T1 bar 88: drums=0.30, bass=0.25, rms=0.30 — diminishing under fade
annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 16: bass emerging (0.35), kick fully locked in
annotated_actions.why: T2 kick established, bass just arrived. Swap transfers bass ownership before T2 bass becomes dominant.

annotated_actions.t2_state: T2 bar 24: full groove at 129.2 BPM — kick+bass+hats, RMS 0.50
annotated_actions.why: T2 full groove. The BPM drop from 136→129 is now established. T1 gone at bar 96.
